options.query: | mstats count("cisco.content.five-seconds") as c WHERE index=cisco_mdt BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as label | eval value=label | fields label value | sort label

| mstats latest("cisco.content.bgp-route-vrfs.bgp-route-vrf.bgp-route-afs.bgp-route-af.afi-safi_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "AFI/SAFI" | table Switch "AFI/SAFI" | sort Switch "AFI/SAFI"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.bgp-route-rds.bgp-route-rd.rd-value_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "Route Distinguisher" | table Switch "Route Distinguisher" | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.ospf-state.op-mode_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "OSPF Mode" | table Switch "OSPF Mode" | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.rib-ipv4-ni.num-entries") as "IPv4 Entries" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | append [| mstats latest("cisco.content.rib-ipv6-ni.num-entries") as "IPv6 Entries" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id] | stats values("IPv4 Entries") as "IPv4 Entries" values("IPv6 Entries") as "IPv6 Entries" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.num-pfx") as "Total Prefixes" latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.num-pfx-fwd") as Forwarding latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.num-pfx-non-fwd") as "Non-Forwarding" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.instance-name_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "VRF:AF Instance" | table Switch "VRF:AF Instance" | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.adjacency-table.num-adjacencies") as Total latest("cisco.content.adjacency-table.num-complete-adjacencies") as Complete latest("cisco.content.adjacency-table.num-incomplete-adjacencies") as Incomplete WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.fib-entries.ip-addr_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | where NOT match(value, ":") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "IPv4 Prefix" | table Switch "IPv4 Prefix" | sort Switch "IPv4 Prefix"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.fib-ni-entry.fib-entries.ip-addr_info") as m WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | where match(value, ":") | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as "IPv6 Prefix" | table Switch "IPv6 Prefix" | sort Switch "IPv6 Prefix"

| mstats latest("cisco.content.address-family-entry.address-family_info") as af_flag latest("cisco.content.interface_info") as intf_flag WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id value | rename cisco.node_id as Switch value as VRF | table Switch VRF | sort Switch VRF

| mstats latest("cisco.content.dhcpv6-relay-binding-stats.bndg-cnt") as "Binding Count" latest("cisco.content.dhcpv6-relay-binding-stats.iana-bndg-cnt") as "IANA Bindings" latest("cisco.content.dhcpv6-relay-binding-stats.iapd-bndg-cnt") as "IAPD Bindings" latest("cisco.content.dhcpv6-relay-binding-stats.bulk-lq-bndg-cnt") as "Bulk Lease Query" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.stratum") as Stratum latest("cisco.content.offset") as "Offset (ms)" latest("cisco.content.root-delay") as "Root Delay" latest("cisco.content.root-disp") as "Root Dispersion" latest("cisco.content.freq-drift-ppm") as "Drift (ppm)" latest("cisco.content.sys-poll") as "Poll Interval" WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch | sort Switch

| mstats latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.peer-stratum") as Stratum latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.delay") as Delay latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.jitter") as Jitter latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.offset") as Offset latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.poll") as Poll latest("cisco.content.ntp-associations.peer-reach") as Reach WHERE index=cisco_mdt cisco.node_id="$switch_node$" BY cisco.node_id assoc-id | rename cisco.node_id as Switch assoc-id as "Assoc ID" | sort Switch "Assoc ID"

title: Cisco IOS XE — Routing
description: BGP, OSPF, RIB/FIB, VRF, DHCP, NTP
